title: Tenant deletion → data cleaned up
evidence: TC-007 test passed in 310ms on first run. All 11 sub-assertions verified: - ✓ DELETE /v1/tenants/:id returns { deleted: true } (HTTP 200) - ✓ tenant.deleted_at is set (soft delete, row preserved) - ✓ message_queue rows purged (2 seeded rows → 0 after delete) - ✓ startup_lock row purged (1 seeded row → 0 after delete) - ✓ TENANT_DELETED audit log entry exists with actor='admin' - ✓ original data_dir no longer accessible on disk - ✓ archiveDir (from audit log metadata) exists on disk - ✓ second DELETE returns HTTP 409 Full suite: 310/310 tests pass (43 test files)
